insurers.name: Nippon Life Insurance Company
insurers.description: Japan's largest private life insurer by assets and policies in force.

insurers.name: Dai-ichi Life Holdings
insurers.description: One of Japan's Big 4 life insurers, publicly listed on TSE.

insurers.name: Meiji Yasuda Life Insurance Company
insurers.description: One of Japan's oldest life insurers, member of the Mitsubishi group.

insurers.name: Sumitomo Life Insurance Company
insurers.description: Big 4 life insurer known for Vitality wellness program partnership with Discovery.

insurers.name: Aflac Life Insurance Japan
insurers.description: Largest cancer and medical insurance provider in Japan.

insurers.name: MetLife Insurance K.K.
insurers.description: Major foreign life insurer in Japan, part of MetLife Inc.

insurers.name: Sony Life Insurance Company
insurers.description: Known for consultation-based life planner sales model, part of Sony Financial Group.

insurers.name: Orix Life Insurance
insurers.description: Online-focused life insurer offering competitive premiums, part of Orix Corporation.

insurers.name: Lifenet Insurance Company
insurers.description: Japan's first online-only life insurer, known for transparent low-cost products.

insurers.name: Tokio Marine & Nichido Fire Insurance
insurers.description: Japan's oldest and largest non-life insurer, part of Tokio Marine Holdings.

insurers.name: Sompo Japan Insurance
insurers.description: One of Japan's top 3 non-life insurers, part of Sompo Holdings.

insurers.name: Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance
insurers.description: Major non-life insurer, part of MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings.

insurers.name: AXA Direct Life / AXA Direct Non-Life
insurers.description: Online insurance arm of AXA in Japan offering life and auto insurance.

insurers.name: Zurich Insurance Japan
insurers.description: Direct auto insurer in Japan backed by the global Zurich Insurance Group.

insurers.name: SBI Insurance Group
insurers.description: Online insurance provider part of SBI Holdings financial services group.
